infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Locket reads your photos locally to surface On This Day memories. Photos never leave your device.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Locket uses your camera to take photos for milestones and map pins.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Locket uses your location to suggest map pins.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Locket sends On This Day and partner activity notifications.

plugins.photosPermission: Locket reads your photos locally for On This Day. Photos never leave your device.
Locket reads your photos locally for On This Day. Photos never leave your device.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Locket uses your location to help you pin places you visit together.
